case_title: KHALID, ABDERRAHMAN VS LUM, BETTIE DBA E & H COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KHALID, ABDERRAHMAN AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, BETTIE DBA E & H COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DUE DILIGENCE BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPT. DEFT NOT SERVED. NO SUCH UNIT NUMBER & NOT LISTED ON BLDG DIRECTORY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUM, BETTIE DBA E & H COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-20-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-25-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO BE HEARD BY COMMISSIONER SLAVIT. PLTF. REFUSES PRO TEM JUDGE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHALID, ABDERRAHMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUM, BETTIE DBA E & H COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
